summary: Comprehensive audit testing of Titelli Marketplace completed. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Create service with image URL
Backend: Create product with delivery option
Backend: Get enterprise info for item
Frontend: Enterprise Dashboard loads with stats (1,234 views, 7 orders, 270 CHF, 4.5 rating)
Frontend: Services & Products list with delete icons
Frontend: Add Service/Product modal with image upload, name, description, type, category, price, delivery
Frontend: Client Dashboard main view with stats (25.50 CHF cash-back, 7 orders)
Frontend: Client Premium section with subscription button (9.90 CHF/mois)
Frontend: Client Finances section with total spent, cash-back, transaction history
Frontend: Client Settings section with notifications, privacy, danger zone
Frontend: Services list page with category filters and cart icons
Frontend: Service detail page with enterprise info, price, add to cart, quantity selector
Frontend: Notifications dropdown with order notifications and timestamps
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warning in EnterpriseDashboard.js: useEffect missing dependency 'fetchAllData' - minor issue, not affecting functionality
seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests was cleaned up automatically via teardown methods
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full audit completed. All enterprise dashboard features working: Services/Products CRUD with image upload, Offers, Jobs, Agenda, Team. All client dashboard sections working: Premium, Finances, Settings. Service detail page with add to cart working. Notifications dropdown working. Routes: /dashboard/entreprise for enterprise, /dashboard/client for client.

services_products.list: Working - shows cards with delete icons
services_products.add_modal: Working - has image upload, name, description, type, category, price, delivery checkbox
services_products.delete: Working - trash icon on each card

enterprise_dashboard.logo_upload: Working - can update enterprise logo via API

client_dashboard.main: Working - shows cash-back, orders, favorites, points
client_dashboard.premium: Working - shows benefits and subscription button
client_dashboard.finances: Working - shows total spent, cash-back, transaction history
client_dashboard.settings: Working - shows notifications, privacy, danger zone

service_product_detail.display: Working - shows image, name, description, price, enterprise info

features_verified.cart: Working - shows empty state with navigation buttons

notifications.dropdown: Working - shows order notifications with timestamps
